assertions.note: 66 lines — exceeds the 60-line limit. Padded with CoC, license, and repetitive bullet lists.
8-step contributing process covers fork, clone, branch, change, test, commit, push, PR.
Starts with '## Code of Conduct' section: 'Our community follows a Code of Conduct to ensure a safe and welcoming environment for all contributors.' — pure boilerplate.
'We welcome contributions from the community!' and formal section headers like 'Pull Request Process' with 4 bureaucratic bullet points. Not appropriate for a solo-maintained tool.
go test ./... mentioned in setup steps and dedicated Testing section.
